zh.lifeSummary: 當William Pettipoole Sr.於1630年10月20日在英國倫敦受洗時，他的父親Samuel Pettypool Poole39歲，母親Alice Jackson11627歲。他於1660年與Ann Parham Smith在美國維吉尼亞州約克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1668年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Pettipoole Sr.于1630年10月20日在英国倫敦受洗时，他的父亲Samuel Pettypool Poole39岁，母亲Alice Jackson11627岁。他于1660年与Ann Parham Smith在美国弗吉尼亚州約克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1668年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Pettipoole Sr. was christened on 20 October 1630, in London, England, his father, Samuel Pettypool Poole, was 39 and his mother, Alice Jackson, was 11627. He married Ann Parham Smith in 1660, in York, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1668, in Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Pettipoole Sr. a été baptisé le 20 octobre 1630, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Samuel Pettypool Poole, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Alice Jackson, avait 11627 ans. Il a épousé Ann Parham Smith en 1660, à York, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1668, à Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Pettipoole Sr. am 20. Oktober 1630 in London, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater Samuel Pettypool Poole 39 und seine Mutter Alice Jackson 11627. Er hat 1660 in York, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Ann Parham Smith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1668 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Virginia, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Pettipoole Sr. è stato battezzato il 20 ottobre 1630 nel London, England, il suo padre, Samuel Pettypool Poole, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Alice Jackson, aveva 11627 anni. Lui sposato Ann Parham Smith nel 1660, nel York, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1668, nel Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Pettipoole Sr.が1630年10月20日にイギリスロンドンで洗礼を受けた時，父Samuel Pettypool Pooleは39歳，母Alice Jacksonは11627歳であった。1660年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ヨークでAnn Parham Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1668年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州で39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Pettipoole Sr.(이)가 1630년 10월 20일 영국 런던에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Samuel Pettypool Poole(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Jackson(은)는 11627세였다. 그는 1660년 미국 버지니아 주 요르크에서 Ann Parham Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1668년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Pettipoole Sr. foi batizado em 20 de outubro de 1630, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Samuel Pettypool Poole, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Alice Jackson, tinha 11627 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Parham Smith em 1660, em York, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1668, em Virginia, British Colonial America, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Pettipoole Sr. был крещен 20 октября 1630 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени Samuel Pettypool Poole было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Jackson, 11627. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Parham Smith в 1660 г. в местности ерк, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1668 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 39 лет.

es.St Dunstan, Stepney, Middlesex, England: Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Pettipoole Sr. se bautizó el 20 de octubre de 1630, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Samuel Pettypool Poole, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Alice Jackson, tenía 11627 años. Se casó con Ann Parham Smith en 1660, en York, Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1668, en Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 39 años.
